trace.summary: Completed the remaining manager, refunds, payments workspace, and repo-runbook fixes by shipping a structured dish editor, manager-gated refund approval, callback preview/simulator workspace controls, and deterministic documentation and health-check validation from the actual repo root.
changes: Replaced the manager workspace's hidden JSON-only dish setup with a structured SSR editor for availability windows, option groups, required rules, and value-level price deltas while preserving publish and image-upload workflows.
Changed high-risk refund approval so Finance Admin users can request refunds but Store Manager users must approve pending step-up refunds with their own password and a dedicated refund:approve nonce.
Expanded the finance payments workspace to expose callback verification preview and JSAPI simulator actions directly in the UI while keeping the existing import and capture flows.

Rewrote the repo-root README and frontend README so startup and test commands point at the real repo layout, added a lightweight documentation smoke check, and added a deterministic Docker health check backed by /healthz.
Updated refund and frontend access-control regression coverage to match the manager-gated approval policy and the shared finance/refunds workspace access.

verification.command: cd repo && python scripts\smoke_check.py && python -m pytest backend\unit_tests\test_refund_service.py backend\API_tests\test_refund_api.py -q && $env:PYTHONPATH='backend'; python -m pytest frontend\API_tests\test_ssr_routes.py frontend\unit_tests\test_session_isolation.py -q
verification.notes: Documentation smoke check passed. Backend refund-focused suites: 6 passed. Frontend route/session suites: 7 passed. Browser E2E coverage was intentionally omitted in this pass per user direction.
